ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Either A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-15-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Either A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-24-2026 Continued To Apr-15-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Wrobel for administrator Rogelio Panday, Jr. (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Wrobel requested additional time to complete the filing of the petition for final distribution.

The Court continued the matter to April 15, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Either A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-23-2025 Continued To Feb-24-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for status hearing for filing of petition for final distribution or for approval of report on status of administration.

Dept. 204; Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Bailiff: Deputy Musto; Not reported

Petitioner Rogelio Panday Jr represented by Thomas S. Wrobel, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.

Petitioner's request for a 60-day continuance to complete final distribution is GRANTED. Court orders matter continued to Feb-24-2026 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. Petition shall address issues presented by the probate examiner.
